eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 11:37 AM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 3:37 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mt. Elden Estates:  Flash Flooding is may be imminent. Dangerous flood waters could be expected in Mt. Elden Estates.  People are advised to Shelter in Place, get to high ground if outside and do not enter drainages.  Know where your children and pets are. Please stay safe.
